phase1.title: Collapse Panel
phase1.content: Tap the arrow to collapse the connection panel and save screen space

phase3.title: Feedback
phase3.content:
Tap the feedback button to report issues anytime
You can also drag it to a preferred position

phase4.title: Invite Friends
phase4.content: Invite friends to sign up and both of you earn free days

phase5.title: Share with Friends
phase5.content: Tap the share button to send your invite link to friends

phase6.title: Choose a Plan
phase6.content: Find the plan that works best for you here
